closed_residuals.title: nix crate unconditionally included — Windows build blocked
closed_residuals.closure_note: nix dependency gated behind #[cfg(unix)]; non-Unix stubs provided

closed_residuals.title: run_reset does raw toml_edit document surgery instead of delegating to policy helpers
closed_residuals.closure_note: Refactored to use reset_agent_doc()/reset_all_agents_doc() policy helpers

closed_residuals.title: ALL_SCHEMA_PATHS manually maintained list separate from build_schema_map()
closed_residuals.closure_note: collect_all_schema_paths() now accepts &[SchemaEntry] from build_schema_map() + glob; manual list eliminated

closed_residuals.title: JoinHandle abort() risk — no graceful cleanup
closed_residuals.closure_note: Replaced with CancellationToken graceful shutdown; doc comment corrected to match actual behavior

closed_residuals.title: Drift detection test may be slow at scale
closed_residuals.closure_note: 500ms default threshold with NEXUS_DRIFT_LIMIT_MS env var override; actual runtime ~9-23ms
